summary: The age-only stale-break no longer applies once a readable pid is present, but a material race remains before the pid is written into the new lock file.

findings.title: Fresh lock can still be broken by age before its creator writes the pid
findings.recommendation: Eliminate the post-create pre-pid window by creating the lock file with the pid content already present in the same exclusive create operation, or otherwise make unreadable/empty freshly-created locks non-breakable by age until ownership metadata is durably written.
